title: Tech companies invoke possibility of Trump’s wrath in fight against Labor’s media laws
summary_full: Tech giants claim Australia’s free trade agreement with US will be violated as they try to kill a proposal to force them to pay news companiesFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastTech companies are invoking Australia’s free trade agreement with the US and threats of Trump administration retaliation in an attempt to kill off the federal government’s proposal to force them to pay news companies.The news media bargaining incentive is designed to force Meta, Google and TikTok to make commercial deals with Australian media outlets or pay a dedicated 2.25% levy on local revenues.
